overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night in a neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. The scene opens with a low-angle view of flying vehicles and elevated highways before transitioning to street-level third-person perspective, following a character walking through wet streets lined with holographic advertisements and towering glass structures.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead through the rainy night sky
camera tilts down from sky view to street level

agents.ego_description: standing beneath the elevated highway looking up at flying vehicles and the towering structure above

notable_agents.action: flying car with illuminated lights passing through the rain above the street

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure with vehicles traveling on the upper deck
futuristic aerial vehicle with glowing lights flying through the rainy night sky
tall dark glass building with scattered illuminated windows rising into the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle view looking up at a massive elevated highway structure on the left. A flying vehicle passes overhead through the heavy rain and fog. The camera slowly tilts down from the sky to reveal the street level below, with wet asphalt and street lights cutting through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street sidewalk beneath elevated highway

events.description: fully transitions to street level walking perspective with sidewalk visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway overpass

entered.detail: large illuminated white billboard with red 'nicola' branding and logo
tall black street lamp with bright white light illuminating the falling rain
tall vertical neon light structures cycling through various colors including green and red

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward at street level along the wet sidewalk. The elevated highway remains visible on the left while a large 'nicola' billboard dominates the right side. Tall street lamps illuminate the heavy rain, and colorful neon pillars become visible in the distance on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with holographic advertisements and neon signage

events.description: camera switches to third-person perspective following a character with red hair and pink pants
passing by colorful neon pillars cycling through green, red, blue, and yellow colors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk passing other pedestrians, viewed from behind in third-person perspective

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with dark clothing and backpack walking in the same direction ahead
pedestrian crossing the sidewalk from left to right in front of the camera

entered.detail: various glowing holographic ads and digital billboards projected on building facades

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character with distinctive red hair walking down the sidewalk. The character passes other pedestrians while colorful neon pillars on the left cycle through vibrant colors. Holographic advertisements glow on the right side buildings, and the wet pavement reflects the neon lights. Traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection beneath elevated highway with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: approaching crosswalk with vehicles including a yellow taxi passing on the wet street
slight turn to the left while approaching the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to cross the street at the intersection while navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the wet road, reflecting neon lights
group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk and waiting at the crosswalk

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt approaching the intersection
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner with illuminated lights

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection beneath the elevated highway. The crosswalk lines become visible on the wet asphalt as vehicles including a yellow taxi drive past. The camera turns slightly left while navigating through pedestrians. The neon pillars and elevated highway recede into the distance as the character prepares to cross the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a towering urban skyline into the neon-lit bustle of a rain-soaked street. It begins with a low-angle view of a massive elevated highway as a flying vehicle glides through heavy fog and rain, before the camera tilts down to reveal the glistening wet asphalt below. As the perspective moves forward along the sidewalk, the scene expands to show a dominant Nicola billboard on the right and glowing neon pillars emerging through the downpour on the left. The camera then shifts into a third-person view following a red-haired character, passing holographic advertisements and reflecting lights as the environment becomes more crowded with pedestrians and traffic. Finally, the movement leads toward a major intersection where the camera navigates through the crowd and past a yellow taxi, with the elevated highway and neon pillars receding into the distance.
